title: Fix timeout issue with built-in volume test
body:
Building our own image to test built-in volume and user
instead of using the mariadb one.
Solves timeout issue in travis tests.

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/1040

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but the tests don't look hip.
This definitely fixes travis, so LGTM. Just need to get the rest of the tests green.

:pushpin: Commit b1e15cc has been approved by `mheon`
